queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the relationship between the absence of a checking account and reduced credit risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Statistical impact of critical credit history or other existing credits on the mitigation of credit default risk.
Assessment of education as a loan purpose as a significant driver for increased credit default probability.
